title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not responding.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it but it still displays the old one.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer is trying to update their profile picture but the upload button is not responding.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving any email notifications after placing an order. Checked spam folder as well.

title: Subscription Plan Not Upgraded
description: Customer paid for premium plan upgrade but account still shows basic plan after 24 hours.

title: Discount Code Not Working
description: Customer is trying to apply a 20% discount code at checkout but it shows invalid every time.

title: Wrong Item Delivered
description: Customer ordered a blue shirt size M but received a red shirt size L instead.

title: Account Locked After Failed Attempts
description: Customer account got locked after 3 failed login attempts. Unable to unlock via email verification.

title: Payment Receipt Not Generated
description: Customer completed payment successfully but no receipt was generated or sent to their email.

title: Dark Mode Not Saving Preference
description: Customer enables dark mode but every time they refresh the page it reverts back to light mode.
